# cloudflare_zero_trust_device_deployment_groups (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_zero_trust_device_deployment_groups" "example_zero_trust_device_deployment_groups" {
  account_id = "account_id"
  group_id = "group_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `group_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The RFC3339Nano timestamp when the deployment group was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) A user-friendly name for the deployment group.
- `policy_ids` (List of String) Contains a list of policy IDs assigned to this deployment group.
- `updated_at` (String) The RFC3339Nano timestamp when the deployment group was last updated.
- `version_config` (Attributes List) Contains version configurations for different target environments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--version_config))

<a id="nestedatt--version_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `version_config`

Read-Only:

- `target_environment` (String) The target environment for the client version (e.g., windows, macos).
- `version` (String) The specific client version to deploy.
